content:
# So2 Concentration

**Summary**: The amount of sulfur dioxide gas present in a specific volume of air.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] measured SO2 concentrations at 28 receptors to evaluate environmental risk.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] Used to assess the impact of industrial emissions on public health and safety.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] Modeled using AERMOD with varying meteorological inputs.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- SO2 levels were found to be well below regulatory limits for all tested scenarios. ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022, p. 78]])
